overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character exploring a space station interior. The character walks through a lounge area with vending machines, transitions through a narrow metallic corridor, and emerges onto an upper concourse with industrial railings overlooking a lower deck. The environment features warm artificial lighting and industrial metal architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station lounge with seating and vending machines

events.description: character turns left and walks toward the corridor entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area toward a corridor entrance, passing vending machines and seating areas

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the doorway at the far end of the room
seated on a couch against the right wall

entered.detail: tall white vending machine with red and blue markings against the left wall
brown upholstered seating furniture against the right wall
large white cylindrical planters with green and orange foliage
exposed pipes and ductwork with fluorescent tube lighting

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a space station lounge with wooden flooring and warm industrial lighting. A vending machine stands to the left while two NPCs occupy the space ahead—one standing guard near a doorway and another seated on a couch. The character walks forward through the open area and turns left toward a corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow connecting corridor with ribbed metal walls

events.description: entering narrow metallic corridor from the lounge area
exiting corridor into open concourse area with railing

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow metallic corridor with ribbed walls and recessed lighting

entered.detail: narrow passage with vertically ribbed metal walls and rounded door frames
illuminated strips embedded in the metal floor plates

segments.scene_description: The character enters a tight, enclosed corridor with ribbed metal walls and industrial floor plates. The lighting is dimmer and more focused than the lounge. The space creates a sense of transition as the character moves through the passage toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level concourse with safety railing overlooking lower deck

events.description: NPC in gas mask and tactical gear walks past the camera from right to left
approaching section with red emergency lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved upper concourse, passing a cleaning cart and approaching a red-lit section

notable_agents.action: wearing tactical gear and yellow gas mask, walking past the camera in the opposite direction
standing near the wall in the background near the stairs

entered.detail: bright white illuminated screen mounted on the wall at the corridor exit
silver metal safety railing along the right edge overlooking the lower level
yellow janitorial cart with black trash bags parked near the railing
large cylindrical support columns with pipes running along them
red illuminated signage and emergency lighting at the far end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the character enters a wide upper concourse with a large digital screen on the left and metal railings on the right overlooking a lower deck. An NPC in a gas mask passes closely by. The character continues along the curved walkway past a yellow cleaning cart, heading toward a section illuminated by red emergency lighting at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy station lounge through a restrictive industrial passage and out onto an expansive upper concourse. It begins in a lounge with wooden flooring and warm lighting, moving past a vending machine and NPCs toward a narrow doorway. As the character enters the corridor, the environment shifts to a dim, enclosed space defined by ribbed metal walls and industrial floor plates. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the passage onto a wide walkway featuring a large digital screen and metal railings that overlook a lower deck. Finally, the camera glides past a gas-masked NPC and a yellow cleaning cart, heading toward a distant section bathed in red emergency lighting.
